+    "description": "declarative openapi validation rules. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kube-rs project",
+        "description": "Verify your kube-rs version and configuration:\n```bash\ncargo --version\nrustc --version\ngrep kube Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null\n```\nThis feature requires a Rust development environment with the kube-rs crate as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-rs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-rs configuration:\n```bash\ngrep -A5 '\\[dependencies\\]' Cargo.toml\ncargo tree | grep kube\n```\nIt would be really cool if we had a way to create declarative openapi validation rules ala:\n- https://book.kubebuilder.io/reference/generating-crd.html \n-"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for declarative openapi validation rules",
+        "description": "For #159\n\nThis might not be the way to go, but at least it's a way to learn how to do proc-macros. It's daunting to try and fix stuff in the existing `k8s-openapi-derive` crate, but might still do that.\n\nFor now, this serves as failing tests. We've ripped out everything but arg parsing from the\n```yaml\nInstead it would have to be written something like this:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\ncargo build 2>&1 | tail -20\ncargo test 2>&1 | tail -20\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"declarative openapi validation rules\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "For #159\n\nThis might not be the way to go, but at least it's a way to learn how to do proc-macros. It's daunting to try and fix stuff in the existing `k8s-openapi-derive` crate, but might still do that.\n\nFor now, this serves as failing tests. We've ripped out everything but arg parsing from the original crate.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Instead it would have to be written something like this:",
+        "---\n\nBy the way, [k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/generators](https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/generators) (used by Operator SDK?) supports [something very similar](https://pkg.go.dev/k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/generators#readme-custom-openapi-type-definitions):"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
